commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://efa-validation-<AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>/manifests/stage4/baseline-tp8.yaml /tmp/baseline-tp8.yaml --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete -f /tmp/baseline-tp8.yaml --ignore-not-found 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete pod mooncake-initiator -n efa-validation --ignore-not-found --grace-period=0 --force 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete pod mooncake-target -n efa-validation --ignore-not-found --grace-period=0 --force 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n efa-validation 2>&1'
